text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower hasn't turned up for training yet. I
wonder what could be holding her up, when...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I spotted a bud in a flower bed that was just
about to bloom...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
So I stopped to give it some encouragement and
lost track of time... I'm really, really sorry...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower seems remorseful about being
late, so I let her off with a warning to be more
careful in the future.
